name: Kashmiri Stir-Fry
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a wok or frying pan over high heat.
2. Add the eggplant and fry until lightly browned. Remove the eggplant and place on a paper towel to soak up excess oil.
3. Fry the broccoli in the same pan for 3 minutes. Add the salt, asafetida, and continue frying.
4. Add the cayenne pepper, paprika, and cooked eggplant, stirring until well mixed.
5. Add 2 to 4 tablespoons of water, lower the heat, and cook, covered, until broccoli is tender and everything is heated through, about 5 to 7 minutes.
6. Serve over rice.
